lessons.title: My Blue Bag
lessons.topic: Basic school items and I have a... review

steps.instruction: Watch the video and answer these questions!

questions.question_text: What do you use to color in your book?
questions.hint: You can make colorful pictures with them.

questions.question_text: What helps you keep your drawings sharp?
Where do you put all your pencils and pens?
questions.hint: It helps you keep them in one place.

items.example: It is on the school table.

steps.title: My School Bag
steps.text: This is my school. I have a green bag. What is in your bag? It is a yellow book. Open your book. It is on the table.

steps.explanation: Say the color before the thing.

steps.audio_text: Hi there! I have a red pencil in my bag and a green book. I use them at school.

questions.question: Where do you use the book?

steps.prompt: Say: I have a red book.

questions.question_text: What is in the bag? (Vocabulary question)
The ___ book is on the table. (Grammar question)
True or False: You open a book to read it. (Reading comprehension question)
What should be opened at school? (Reading comprehension question)

steps.instruction: Watch and listen. Look at the picture!
steps.question_text: What do I use to write?
steps.hint: It's something sharp you hold in your hand.

steps.title: My School Bag
steps.text: What is in your bag? I have a big pencil. I have a blue pen. I can write my name. It is on the paper. I can draw a rainbow.

steps.explanation: Use this to say what you own.

steps.audio_text: I have a blue pen. I can draw a nice picture on my paper.

questions.question: What can I draw on the paper?

steps.prompt: Say: What is in your bag?

questions.question_text: What is in your bag? (Grammar question)
Which tool can you use to write?
I use a pencil to ___.
True or False: We write with a spoon.
What can you see on your paper?

steps.instruction: Watch the video and answer these questions!

questions.question_text: What do you use to draw a straight line?
questions.hint: It's long and helps make lines straight!

questions.question_text: Which tool helps you remove pencil marks?
Which one do you use to measure things?

items.example: What is in your pencil box? I have a small eraser.
I have a long ruler in my bag.
It is on the big desk.
The book is on the desk.

steps.title: My School Bag
steps.text: I have a big desk. The eraser is on the desk. My ruler is long and blue. What is in your bag? My pen is in the bag!

steps.explanation: Use 'in' to show inside a place.

steps.audio_text: I have a red eraser on my desk. The ruler is blue, and it is in the bag.

steps.prompt: Say: It is on the desk.

questions.question_text: Which word means 'to fix pencil mistakes'?
Fill in the blank: It is on the ___.
True or False: A ruler is used for measuring.
Where is the ruler? It is on the ___.
Which tool is long for drawing straight lines?

steps.instruction: Watch the video and answer these questions!

questions.question_text: What do you see in the classroom?
questions.hint: Where you put your books and write.

questions.question_text: Who helps you learn in the video?
questions.hint: This person stands at the front and explains things.

questions.question_text: What do you use to write in school?
questions.hint: It's long, thin, and has an eraser at the end.

steps.title: Emma's Classroom
steps.text: I am Emma. I have a blue book. In my bag, there is an orange eraser and a pink crayon. My pencil is on the chair. I love my classroom!

steps.audio_text: I have a yellow pencil case and three green pencils. The pencil case is in my backpack, and the pencils are on my desk.

questions.question: What color is the pencil case?

steps.prompt: What is in your school bag? Say, 'I have a ___ and a ___.'
steps.expected_text: i have a pencil and a book

questions.question_text: What is in your backpack? (Grammar question)
Which one is a 'desk'? (Vocabulary question)
True or False: The pencil is on the table.
Fill in the blank: I have a ___ notebook. (Grammar question)
Which sentence is correct? (Reading comprehension)
questions.correct_answer: The backpack is on the chair.
options: The chair is on the backpack.
The backpack is on the chair.
The book is in the chair.
